scripts.verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm lint && pnpm test
scripts.migrate: pnpm --filter @watt/gateway exec wrangler d1 migrations apply watt-policies --remote
scripts.release:cli: pnpm --filter @tokenroll/watt typecheck && pnpm --filter @tokenroll/watt test && pnpm --filter @tokenroll/watt build && node scripts/pack-smoke-cli.mjs && pnpm publish --filter @tokenroll/watt --access public --no-git-checks
